summary: Iteration 155 testing completed for 7 frontend patches establishing 3 commercial lanes. All tested features are working correctly: Landing page shows 3 commercial lane cards with correct badges and hrefs, QuoteRequestPage has lane picker with conditional sections and URL pre-selection, In-account marketplace tabs are in correct order (Products > Promotional Materials > Services), Public marketplace mentions 'promotional materials' in subtitle, ServiceNavigationDropdownData has correct requestType and marketplaceTab values, No routing to /api/guest-leads in patched files.
critical_code_review_comments: ServiceNavigationDropdownData.js correctly marks items with requestType (service_quote, promo_custom, product_bulk) and marketplaceTab (services, promo, products)
HomeBusinessSolutionsSection.jsx shows 4 cards (3 commercial lanes + Country Expansion) with correct badges: Operational Buying, Brand Growth, Sales Assisted, Africa Growth
QuoteRequestPage.jsx correctly resolves canonical request_type based on primary_lane selection and includes primary_lane in details
MarketplaceUnifiedPageV3.jsx TABS order is correct: Products > Promotional Materials > Services
FeaturedMarketplaceSection.jsx getListingMeta() correctly classifies items with Product, Promotional Materials, or Service badges
QuickRequestForm.jsx has PRIMARY_LANES and REQUEST_TYPE_OPTIONS pattern but is not currently rendered on customer dashboard
No /api/guest-leads routing found in any of the 7 patched files
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 frontend patches for 3 commercial lanes are working. Key verifications: (1) Landing page HomeBusinessSolutionsSection shows 3 lane cards with correct badges and hrefs, (2) QuoteRequestPage lane picker works with URL pre-selection (?type=service_quote, ?type=promo_custom, ?type=product_bulk), (3) In-account marketplace tabs order is Products > Promotional Materials > Services, (4) Form submissions use canonical request_type values. FeaturedMarketplaceSection only renders when listings are available from API. QuickRequestForm component exists but is not currently rendered on customer dashboard.

features_tested.landing_page_3_lanes: PASS - Marketplace Products (Operational Buying, /marketplace?tab=products), Promotional Materials (Brand Growth, /marketplace?tab=promo), Business Services (Sales Assisted, /marketplace?tab=services)
features_tested.landing_page_ctas: PASS - 'Start a Request' links to /request-quote?primary=services, 'Explore Promotional Materials' links to /marketplace?tab=promo
features_tested.quote_request_lane_picker: PASS - 3 primary lanes (Products, Promotional Materials, Services) with conditional sections
features_tested.quote_request_url_preselection: PASS - ?type=service_quote pre-selects Services, ?type=promo_custom pre-selects Promo, ?type=product_bulk pre-selects Products
features_tested.quote_request_submission: PASS - Form submits to /api/public-requests with canonical request_type and primary_lane in details
features_tested.account_marketplace_tabs: PASS - Tab order is Products > Promotional Materials > Services
features_tested.account_marketplace_filtering: PASS - Promo tab filters to promotional items, Products tab excludes promo items
features_tested.service_navigation_data: PASS - Items have key, requestType (service_quote/promo_custom/product_bulk), marketplaceTab (services/promo/products)
features_tested.no_guest_leads_routing: PASS - No /api/guest-leads routing in patched files
